Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $404,508,916Details
International Box Office $557,123,891
Worldwide Box Office $961,632,807
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $37,527,605
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $32,908,617
Total $70,436,222
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Four teenagers in detention are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When they discover an old video game console with a game they’ve never heard of, they are immediately thrust into the game’s jungle setting, into the bodies of their avatars. What they discover is that you don’t just play Jumanji—Jumanji plays you. They’ll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, or they’ll be stuck in the game forever…

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$36,169,328 (8.9% of total gross)
Legs:8.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 10.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,765 opening theaters/3,849 max. theaters, 11.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $534,519,633

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 20th, 2017 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: December 20th, 2017 (Wide) (Trinidad)
December 20th, 2017 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
December 20th, 2017 (Wide) (France)
December 20th, 2017 (Wide) (Switzerland)
December 20th, 2017 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: March 20th, 2018 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for adventure action, suggestive content and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2498 (Cert #50337), 10/18/2017)
Running Time: 119 minutes
Franchise: Jumanji
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos, Intertitle, Legacy Sequel, Prologue, Same Role, Multiple Actors
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Filming location (city or town): Atlanta, GA, Union City, GA
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (locale): Ansley Park, Atlanta, GA, He'eia Kea Jungle, Oahu, HI, Kawainui Falls, Hawai'i, HI, Kawela Beach, Oahu, HI, Kualoa Ranch, Oahu, HI, Nu'uanu Pali, Oahu, HI, Turtle Bay, Oahu, HI, Waimea Falls Park, Oahu, HI, Westlake High School, Fulton County, GA
Filming location (production facility): Atlanta Metro Studios, Union City, GA
Filming location (state or county): Fulton County, GA, Georgia, United States, Hawai'i, HI, Hawaii, United States, Oahu, HI
Plot point: Academics, Alternate Reality Game, Explorer, False Identity, Jungle, Paleontologist, Video Game
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Matt Tolmach Productions, Seven Bucks Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Four teenagers in detention are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When they discover an old video game console with a game they’ve never heard of, they are immediately thrust into the game’s jungle setting, into the bodies of their avatars. What they discover is that you don’t just play Jumanji—Jumanji plays you. They’ll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, or they’ll be stuck in the game forever…

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$36,169,328 (8.9% of total gross)
Legs:8.08 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 10.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,765 opening theaters/3,849 max. theaters, 11.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $534,519,633

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 20th, 2017 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: December 20th, 2017 (Wide) (Trinidad)

Video Release: March 20th, 2018 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for adventure action, suggestive content and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2498 (Cert #50337), 10/18/2017)
Running Time: 119 minutes
Franchise: Jumanji
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos, Intertitle, Legacy Sequel, Prologue, Same Role, Multiple Actors
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Filming location (city or town): Atlanta, GA, Union City, GA
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (locale): Ansley Park, Atlanta, GA, He'eia Kea Jungle, Oahu, HI, Kawainui Falls, Hawai'i, HI, Kawela Beach, Oahu, HI, Kualoa Ranch, Oahu, HI, Nu'uanu Pali, Oahu, HI, Turtle Bay, Oahu, HI, Waimea Falls Park, Oahu, HI, Westlake High School, Fulton County, GA
Filming location (production facility): Atlanta Metro Studios, Union City, GA
Filming location (state or county): Fulton County, GA, Georgia, United States, Hawai'i, HI, Hawaii, United States, Oahu, HI
Plot point: Academics, Alternate Reality Game, Explorer, False Identity, Jungle, Paleontologist, Video Game
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Matt Tolmach Productions, Seven Bucks Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
